collectiondata.overview:
Wander More, Spend Less: Travel Tales Under 75,000 with Travelxploria

Sometimes, magic hides in the most unexpected price tags. With Travelxploria’s handpicked journeys under 75,000, you’re not just checking off places—you’re unlocking portals to new cultures, warm smiles, and adventures that don’t ask your wallet for permission.

Step into worlds where glass towers kiss the clouds and street vendors serve recipes passed down through generations. Let yourself get lost in alleyways painted with murals, marketplaces humming with color, or monasteries perched on mountains that touch the sky. Glide over emerald waters on a slow boat, sip coffee under cherry blossoms, or dance under the open desert sky—it’s all possible, and beautifully affordable.

Our Best Tour Operator services ensure that even at this budget, you’ll find boutique stays, immersive experiences, and those little touches that make travel feel effortless. Whether it’s lantern-lit dinners by the lake, ancient cities whispered in legend, or jungle trails echoing with birdsong, every itinerary is crafted to move your heart, not just your feet.

With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator—we turn “someday” into “right now.” Perfect for couples seeking meaningful escapes, families building shared memories, or curious souls chasing the horizon, these thoughtfully designed Best Family Packages, romantic getaways, and cultural deep-dives are all within reach.

You don’t need to go far to go deep. You just need the right partner. Let Travelxploria take you there—unforgettable journeys under 75,000, wrapped in stories, not spreadsheets.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Hong Kong, check-in, and enjoy a leisurely Lantau tour with shopping and local delicacies.
  • Explore Hong Kong city with visits to Madame Tussauds and Aberdeen Village.
  • Spend a magical full day at Hong Kong Disneyland filled with fun, shows, and adventure.
  • Discover marine life and thrilling rides at Ocean Park, including dolphin and panda encounters.
  • Visit Lantau Island, starting with the Avenue of Stars and other iconic attractions.
  • Depart from Hong Kong with wonderful memories and souvenirs from your trip.​

Upon your arrival at Hong Kong International Airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and escort you to your hotel. After completing the check-in formalities, settle into your room and take some time to relax and unwind from your journey. Later, begin your Hong Kong experience with a leisurely tour of Lantau Island, soaking in the vibrant cityscape and scenic beauty. You’ll have the opportunity to explore some of the island’s key attractions, indulge in retail therapy at popular shopping hubs, and sample the unique and delicious culinary delights that make Hong Kong a true food lover’s paradise.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Hong Kong Airport","to":"Hong Kong","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1681,"h_name":"ibis Hong Kong North Point","h_country":"China","h_city":"Hong Kong","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/ibis Hong Kong North Point/1747740830535-ibis Hong Kong North Point.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/ibis Hong Kong North Point/1747740830618-ibis Hong Kong North Point1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/ibis Hong Kong North Point/1747740830660-ibis Hong Kong North Point2.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":1684,"h_name":"Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View","h_country":"China","h_city":"Hong Kong","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View/1747741203390-Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View/1747741203249-Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View/1747741203383-Ramada Hong Kong Harbour View1.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1687,"h_name":"Hong Kong SkyCity Marriott Hotel","h_country":"China","h_city":"Hong Kong","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"HongKong city tour","day_summary":"

Start your exciting day with a complimentary and delicious breakfast before setting out on a guided city tour of Hong Kong. Your first stop will be the world-famous Madame Tussauds Wax Museum, where you can capture memorable photos alongside lifelike figures of your favorite celebrities and icons. Next, visit the charming and traditional Aberdeen Village, known for its floating houses and rich cultural heritage. Stroll through the area to witness the local way of life and explore nearby shops offering exquisite jewellery and souvenirs. After a fulfilling day of sightseeing and exploration, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day Disneyland tour","day_summary":"

On the third day, get ready for an unforgettable adventure at one of Hong Kong’s most exciting attractions—Disneyland. Immerse yourself in the magical world of your favorite Disney characters, take fun-filled photographs, and relive childhood memories. Spend the day enjoying thrilling rides, themed zones, and spectacular live performances including The Lion King Show and other enchanting theatrical displays. Don’t miss the mesmerizing nighttime light show, a perfect ending to a day of joy and wonder. After an action-packed experience filled with laughter, excitement, and fantasy, return to your hotel and unwind with a peaceful overnight stay to recharge for tomorrow.






","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day Ocean Park tour","day_summary":"

On the fourth day, get ready to explore the wonders of Ocean Park, one of Hong Kong’s premier marine-themed amusement parks. Dive into a world of underwater adventure as you witness fascinating marine life and enjoy thrilling rides and attractions. Don’t miss the spectacular dolphin show, a crowd favorite that delights visitors of all ages. Stroll through the Amazing Asian Animals Zone, where you can see and take photos with rare and exotic creatures like alligators, birds, dolphins, and the beloved giant pandas. It’s a perfect blend of education, excitement, and fun, making it a memorable experience for everyone.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Lantau Island tour","day_summary":"

Start the fifth day with a delicious and refreshing breakfast, setting the tone for an exciting adventure ahead. Today, you will explore the scenic and culturally rich Lantau Island, one of Hong Kong’s most iconic destinations. Your journey begins with a visit to the captivating Avenue of Stars, inspired by Hollywood’s famous Walk of Fame. Stroll along the promenade as you admire statues, celebrity handprints, and tributes to legends of Hong Kong cinema, all set against the breathtaking backdrop of Victoria Harbour. This scenic and star-studded walkway offers fantastic photo opportunities and a memorable start to your Lantau Island experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure from HongKong","day_summary":"

As your wonderful journey in Hong Kong comes to an end, begin your final day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel. Afterward, pack your belongings and complete the check-out formalities. Our Travelxploria representative will assist you with your transfer to the airport, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. If time permits, you can explore last-minute shopping options at the airport to pick up souvenirs and gifts. With your heart full of unforgettable memories, vibrant experiences, and scenic moments, board your flight back home. Travelxploria hopes to welcome you again on another memorable adventure in the future.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Hong Kong","to":"Hong Kong Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.package_name: Hong Kong: The Paradise of Globetrotters
packages.overview:
• Arrival, check-in, Victoria Peak tram ride, Aberdeen Fishing Village, shopping, Madame Tussauds, and Dragon Pearl Cruise light show.
  •  Full day at Ocean Park exploring marine life, thrilling rides, and live shows.
  • Enjoy Disneyland’s rides, shows, characters, and nightly fireworks.
  • Lantau Island tour including Ngong Ping 360 cable car, Po Lin Monastery, Giant Buddha, and sunset views.
  • Ferry transfer to Macau, hotel check-in, leisure day with local cuisine and nightlife experience.
  • Macau city tour covering Ruins of St. Paul’s, Na Tcha Temple, A-Ma Temple, Old City Walls, and Mount Fortress.
  • Breakfast, checkout, ferry back to Hong Kong International Airport, and departure for India.

Upon your arrival at Hong Kong International Airport, you will be warmly received by the Travelxploria representative, who will escort you to your hotel. After check-in and a brief rest, your romantic journey begins with a visit to Victoria Peak via the iconic Peak Tram, offering panoramic views of the skyline and Victoria Harbour. Enjoy a sunset at the emerald hills, painting the sky in hues of pink and orange. Explore Aberdeen Fishing Village, famous for its seafood and floating lifestyle, followed by shopping for gems and souvenirs. Later, visit Madame Tussauds and end your evening with the spectacular Dragon Pearl Cruise and Symphony of Lights show.

Kong2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/Dorsett Kai Tak, Hong Kong/1747741391302-Dorsett Kai Tak, Hong Kong1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" HongKong: A Remarkable tour to Ocean Park","day_summary":"

Begin your day in Hong Kong with a hearty breakfast, then get ready for an exciting adventure at Ocean Park, Asia’s largest oceanarium. With your life partner, explore vibrant marine life, thrilling water rides, and entertaining live shows. Discover the magic of the Grand Aquarium, experience the 360-degree Symbio water screen, and marvel at rare sea creatures. Wander through recreated polar zones and rainforests hand-in-hand. Don’t miss top attractions like Thrill Mountain, Waterfront, and Adventure Land. As you return to your hotel, you’ll cherish the unforgettable memories and realize this honeymoon package from India has given you one of the most magical days of your life.




","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"HongKong: A day at Disneyland","day_summary":"

Start your magical day with a delicious breakfast before heading to Hong Kong Disneyland for a whimsical adventure. Explore enchanting lands with your partner, from the Orbitron ride to iconic attractions like Sleeping Beauty Castle, Cinderella Carousel, Snow White Grotto, and The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh. Step into Tomorrowland for thrilling experiences like Space Mountain and Buzz Lightyear Astro Blasters. Enjoy captivating live shows and soak in scenic views of the surrounding mountains. Savor mouthwatering Chinese and Asian cuisines throughout the park. Don’t miss the grand finale—Disney’s breathtaking fireworks show at 8 PM, creating unforgettable memories of your honeymoon.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"HongKong: A day trip to Lantau Island","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast before heading to Lantau Island, the largest in Hong Kong, for a peaceful yet vibrant escape with your beloved. Travel via the Ngong Ping 360 cable car, enjoying panoramic views of lush mountains and the sparkling ocean. Arrive at Ngong Ping Village, full of eateries and shopping delights. Explore the tranquil Po Lin Monastery and the majestic Tian Tan Buddha, once the world’s largest outdoor bronze Buddha. Don’t miss the serene Ngong Ping Piazza and Wisdom Path. End your scenic day with a glorious sunset view from the cable car before returning to your hotel for rest.






","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Macao","country":"China","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064601153-AdobeStock_167672430.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064599111-AdobeStock_83744137.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064601638-AdobeStock_242255240.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064602546-AdobeStock_643469939.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064601999-AdobeStock_297573208.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/China/Macao/1747064603180-AdobeStock_1890002441.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Macau: Arrival and leisure","day_summary":"

Begin your journey from Hong Kong to Macau with a scenic ferry ride as part of your romantic honeymoon. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and transfer to the HKG Ferry Terminal. Upon arriving in Macau, proceed to your hotel via a pre-arranged shuttle and complete your check-in. Take some time to relax before enjoying a leisurely stroll through Macau’s peaceful streets and sampling authentic Chinese cuisine. As night falls, dive into Macau’s vibrant nightlife—visit lively clubs, bars, or try your luck at a casino. Celebrate love with a toast before returning to your hotel for a restful night’s sleep.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast before beginning your Macau city tour, a day filled with timeless beauty and heritage. Your first stop is the iconic Ruins of St. Paul’s, a 16th-century marvel followed by the Na Tcha Temple, a sacred site built in 1888. Continue to the ancient A-Ma Temple, dedicated to the sea goddess Matsu. Explore the Old City Walls, remnants of Macau’s colonial era, and visit the historic Mount Fortress, now a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Capture beautiful moments with your partner, shop for souvenirs, and return to your hotel feeling fulfilled, proud to have chosen this memorable honeymoon package.








","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Macau: Departure","day_summary":"

Begin your final day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, savoring the last moments of your memorable honeymoon. After breakfast, pack your belongings and complete the check-out formalities. A Travelxploria representative will assist you with your transfer to the Macau Ferry Terminal. Board your ferry to Hong Kong International Airport Terminal (HKI), where you’ll catch your flight back to India. As you journey home, cherish the unforgettable experiences, romantic moments, and stunning sights of Hong Kong and Macau. These precious memories will stay with you, ready to be shared with your family and friends, reminding you of a perfect honeymoon.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Hong Kong and enjoy a relaxing evening city tour showcasing its vibrant nightlife.
  • Spend a magical full day at Disneyland filled with rides, parades, shopping, and fireworks.
  • Explore Ocean Park for a thrilling mix of marine life exhibits, shows, and amusement rides.
  • Enjoy a leisure day shopping, dining, and exploring Hong Kong at your own pace.
  • Depart from Hong Kong, taking home unforgettable memories of your exciting journey.

Upon your arrival at Hong Kong International Airport, your exciting journey begins. A Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, assist with your luggage, and escort you to your hotel. During the drive, the representative will brief you on the day’s itinerary, including the timing and places to visit. Once you arrive, complete your check-in formalities and settle into your room. Take some time to relax and refresh after your journey. In the evening, prepare for an enchanting night tour of Hong Kong, where you’ll explore the city’s iconic landmarks, vibrant nightlife, and experience the energy of this dazzling metropolis.

Kong2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hong Kong/Dorsett Kai Tak, Hong Kong/1747741391302-Dorsett Kai Tak, Hong Kong1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Disneyland tour","day_summary":"

Start your second day with a delicious and healthy breakfast at your hotel before heading out for a full-day tour of Hong Kong Disneyland, the city’s most popular attraction. This magical theme park offers endless fun and excitement for visitors of all ages. Spend the day exploring thrilling rides, meeting your favorite Disney characters, and shopping for unique souvenirs. Enjoy dining experiences with beloved Disney friends, creating unforgettable memories. As evening falls, be sure to catch the spectacular fireworks and dazzling nighttime light show at 8 pm, a highlight that perfectly caps off a day full of joy and adventure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ocean Park tour","day_summary":"

On the third day, visit Ocean Park, Hong Kong’s renowned marine-themed amusement park established in 1977. This unique destination combines thrilling rides, captivating shows, and impressive marine life exhibits. In 2012, Ocean Park became the first Asian recipient of the prestigious Applause Award for its outstanding visitor experience, blending education with conservation efforts. Spend your day exploring the park’s diverse attractions, from exciting roller coasters to interactive animal displays. Don’t miss the opportunity to see rare and exotic marine species up close while enjoying a perfect mix of fun, adventure, and learning in this world-class aquatic park.







","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Day at leisure","day_summary":"

The fourth day is reserved for you to explore Hong Kong at your own pace. Start your day with some shopping in the city’s popular malls, as Hong Kong is known as one of the world’s top shopping destinations. You’ll find a wide range of items including cosmetics, electronics, perfumes, jewellery, designer clothing, watches, and famous local pastries. Take time to wander through vibrant local markets and sample delicious local cuisines. In the evening, enjoy dinner at one of the city’s favorite restaurants, soaking in the lively atmosphere and diverse flavors Hong Kong has to offer.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

As your memorable Hong Kong journey comes to an end, begin your final day with a lavish breakfast at the hotel. After savoring your meal, complete your check-out formalities and prepare for departure. A Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with your transfer to Hong Kong International Airport, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. Take a moment to reflect on the incredible experiences, stunning sights, and unforgettable memories you’ve gathered throughout your trip. Board your flight home with a heart full of joy and stories to share, carrying the essence of Hong Kong with you forever.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Hong Kong","to":"Hong Kong Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Explore the ancient cities of Samarkand, Bukhara, and Tashkent, among the oldest in the world.

  • Discover architectural masterpieces that have witnessed the footsteps of Alexander the Great and Genghis Khan.

  • Visit Samarkand, the medieval capital of Tamerlane's Empire and a key hub of the Great Silk Road.

  • Marvel at tall minarets, grand mosques, and majestic madrasahs adorned with intricate ceramic decorations.

  • Wander through medieval palaces and mausoleums steeped in centuries of history.

  • Experience the vibrant atmosphere and vivid colors of traditional oriental bazaars.

  • Hear fascinating legends and stories from Uzbekistan’s rich past.

  • Taste authentic Uzbek cuisine, renowned for its flavor and variety.

  • Discover the traditional craftsmanship and unique arts of local artisans.

  • Feel the warm hospitality and deeply rooted traditions of the Uzbek people, creating unforgettable memories.

Upon arrival in Tashkent, you will be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative. Please note that early check-in is not available on this day. Begin a guided sightseeing tour of Tashkent, exploring the historic Khast-Imam complex, Kafal Shashi Mausoleum, Barak Khan and Muyi Muborak madrasahs—home to the world’s oldest Quran. Visit the operating Kukeldash Madrasah and the colorful Chorsu Bazaar. Continue to People's Friendship Square, Amir Temur Square, the “Courage” Monument, Opera and Ballet Theater, Mustakillik Square, Grand Duke Romanov’s Palace, and enjoy a metro ride. Overnight at hotel.

mountains","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, embark on an excursion to the scenic Chimgan Mountains, often called the “Uzbek Switzerland” for their natural beauty and healing atmosphere. Admire slopes covered with ancient juniper forests and rivers winding through the hills. Enjoy breathtaking panoramic views from the mountain's peak. Continue to the modern Amirsoy resort, where you’ll ride a 2,193-meter-long cable car for a bird’s eye view of the majestic mountains. On the return journey, stop for a self-guided photo session at the stunning Charvak Reservoir. Enjoy lunch at a mountain café. Around 16:00, return to Tashkent and transfer to your hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Samarkand","country":"Uzbekistan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044635884-AdobeStock_253540120-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044637149-AdobeStock_323282832-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044635633-AdobeStock_221269069-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044636971-AdobeStock_273498964-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044637090-AdobeStock_297552163-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Uzbekistan/Samarkand/1747044637396-AdobeStock_515987779-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer to Samarkand from Tashkent","day_summary":"

After breakfast, transfer to Samarkand by high-speed Afrosiab train (08:04–10:22). Upon arrival, meet your local guide and driver to begin sightseeing. Start at Registan Square, the heart of Samarkand, featuring three grand madrassahs—Sherdor, Ulugbek, and Tillya Qory (14th–16th centuries). Visit the impressive Bibi-Khanum Mosque, Gur-Emir Mausoleum of Tamerlane and his descendants, and the bustling Siab Bazaar. Explore Ulugbek’s 15th-century observatory, home to a massive astrolabe, then continue to the Shakhi-Zinda necropolis with its beautifully decorated mausoleums. Discover traditional crafts at the Konigil ethnic village and explore the vibrant “Eternal City” complex. Overnight at the hotel in Samarkand.

from Samarkand to Bukhara","day_summary":"

Transfer from Samarkand to Bukhara by Afrosiab high-speed train (10:32–12:15). Upon arrival, meet your local guide and driver to begin a walking city tour of Bukhara. Explore the Lyabi-Khauz complex, the heart of old Bukhara, featuring Central Asia’s oldest pool (14th–17th centuries), surrounded by the Nadira Divan-Begi madrasah and khanaka with beautiful mosaic facades, and the grand Kukeldash Madrasah (15th century). Continue to the iconic Poi-Kalyan Complex, home to the 48-meter Kalyan Minaret (12th century), the vast Kalyan Friday Mosque (15th century) with its 288 domed galleries, and the still-active Miri-Arab Madrasah (16th century). Overnight at hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Train","from":"Samarkand","to":"Bukhara","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1558,"h_name":"Kavsar Boutique Hotel","h_country":"Uzbekistan","h_city":"Bukhara","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Kavsar Boutique Hotel/1747297365490-Kavsar Boutique Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Kavsar Boutique Hotel/1747297365606-Kavsar Boutique Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Kavsar Boutique Hotel/1747297365645-Kavsar Boutique Hotel2.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":1560,"h_name":"Wyndham Bukhara","h_country":"Uzbekistan","h_city":"Bukhara","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Wyndham Bukhara/1747299952047-Wyndham Bukhara1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Wyndham Bukhara/1747299952128-Wyndham Bukhara2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Wyndham Bukhara/1747299952237-Wyndham Bukhara3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Wyndham Bukhara/1747299952348-Wyndham Bukhara4.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1561,"h_name":"Mercure Bukhara Old Town","h_country":"Uzbekistan","h_city":"Bukhara","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Mercure Bukhara Old Town/1747300345423-Mercure Bukhara Old Town.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Mercure Bukhara Old Town/1747300345500-Mercure Bukhara Old Town1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Bukhara/Mercure Bukhara Old Town/1747300345608-Mercure Bukhara Old Town2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Bukhara sightseeing and departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, continue your guided walking tour of Bukhara with your Travelxploria representative. Visit the elegant Samanids Mausoleum (9th–10th centuries), one of the oldest monuments of Islamic architecture in Central Asia. Explore the ancient Ark Citadel (4th–20th centuries), the former royal residence of Bukhara’s Emirs, and the unique Chor-Minor with its four minarets (19th century). Discover the opulent Sitorai-Mohi-Hosa Palace, the Emirs' summer residence (19th–20th centuries). After lunch, transfer to the train station for your journey back to Tashkent via Afrosiab train (16:17–20:31). Upon arrival, enjoy dinner (not included), followed by transfer to Tashkent International Airport for departure.

packages.overview:
Arrival in Amman and city tour featuring Islamic sites and companions’ tombs.

Explore Ajloun Castle and visit the shrines of revered Islamic figures.

Visit Jerash’s Roman ruins and continue to more Sahaba shrines near Amman.

Discover the Dead Sea, Prophet Lot’s Cave, and companions’ tombs in the Jordan Valley.

Tour Salt to visit the shrines of Prophets Shu’ayb, Yusha, Ayyoub, and nearby Sahaba.

Journey to Kerak for Mu’tah battlefield, martyrs’ tombs, Prophet Nuh’s shrine, and Kerak Castle.

Departure from Amman with fond memories of Jordan’s Islamic heritage.

Upon arrival at Queen Alia International Airport in Amman, you will be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative for visa assistance. Begin your exploration of Amman with visits to the Citadel, home to ancient ruins including the Temple of Hercules, Umayyad Palace, and a Byzantine church, followed by the Roman Theatre and Al Husseini Mosque. Visit the stunning King Abdullah Mosque, then proceed to the shrines of revered companions: Abdul-Rahman bin Awf, Bilal bin Rabah, and the sacred site of Kahf Al-Raqim (Cave of the Seven Sleepers). Conclude the day with hotel check-in, dinner, and overnight stay in Amman.

Al –Khadir tombs . Ajloun Islamic Castle, 'Ikremah Bin Abi Jahl Tomb -Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, embark on a scenic drive north toward Ajloun, passing through lush pine forests and olive groves. Visit the impressive Ajloun Castle, a 12th-century fortress built by Usama bin Munqith, nephew of Saladin, to defend against Crusader attacks. Admire its Islamic architecture, towers, and panoramic hilltop views. Nearby, visit the tomb of ‘Ikrimah bin Abi Jahl, a former enemy turned devout companion of the Prophet , martyred at Yarmouk. Also, explore the revered shrine of Al-Khadir (St. George), associated with divine miracles and cited in the Holy Quran. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – The Dead Sea (Prophet Lot) – The Jordan valley-Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, drive to the Dead Sea, the lowest point on Earth at 400 meters below sea level. Famous for its high salt and mineral content, the Dead Sea’s waters have been valued for their healing properties since the time of Herod the Great. Enjoy floating effortlessly in its buoyant waters or relax at nearby health spas and luxury resorts. Visit the historic Lot’s Cave, where Prophet Lot took refuge, and see ruins and mosaics linked to his story, mentioned in both the Quran and Bible. Continue to the Jordan Valley to visit the tombs of several revered companions of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), including Abu Ubeida Amer bin Al-Jarrah, Mo’ath bin Jabal, Shurhabil bin Hasanah, Amir bin Abi Waqqas, and Derar bin Al-Azwar—prominent figures who played key roles in early Islamic history and battles. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – Salt (Tombs of Prophet Shu'ayb , prophet Ayyoub , Prophet Yosha , and Maysarah Ben Masrouq Al- 'Abssi –Amman","day_summary":"

After breakfast at your hotel in Amman, drive northwest to Salt, once the capital of Jordan during Ottoman rule and a key administrative center. Wander through its charming streets lined with dazzling houses featuring distinctive long-arched windows, offering a glimpse into its rich past. Visit significant Islamic sites around Salt, including the modern mosque in Wadi Shu’ayb, home to the shrine of Prophet Ju’ayb (Jethro), father-in-law of Prophet Moses, who preached monotheism and honesty to his people. On a hill west of Salt lies the shrine of Prophet Yusha (Joshua), Moses’ successor who led the conquest of Palestine. Nearby, explore the foundations of an ancient building at Kherbit Ayyoub, marking the tomb of Prophet Ayyub (Job), famed for his patience and faith. Also visit the tomb of venerable companion Maysarah bin Masrouq Al-Abssi in ’Arda, who fought in key battles and led the first Muslim army into Byzantine territory. Return to Amman for dinner and overnight.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – Kerak ( battle of Mu’tah ; tombs of Zaid Bin Harithah, Ja`far Bin Abi Talib, Abdullah Bin Ruwahah ,","day_summary":"

After breakfast in Amman, drive south to Kerak to visit the historic site of the Battle of Mutah (629 A.D.), Prophet Muhammad’s fiercest battle against Byzantine and Ghassanid forces. Visit the tombs of revered companions Zaid bin Harithah, Ja’far bin Abi Talib, and Abdullah bin Ruwahah, all martyred in the battle. Zaid, mentioned by name in the Quran, led the army bravely until his death. Ja’far, known as “the flying Ja’far,” lost his hands but held the banner until he fell, and Abdullah, a devoted soldier and poet, also commanded before his martyrdom. Explore Kerak’s shrines, including those of Prophet Nuh (Noah), Prophet Sulayman (Solomon), and Zaid bin Ali bin Al-Hussein, known for their piety and wisdom. End the day visiting Kerak’s famous Crusader castle, notable for its role in battles against Saladin, and nearby Sobak Castle, which fell to Saladin 75 years after its construction.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Free day in Amman (shopping)","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast at your hotel in Amman, and start your shopping day. Amman offers various shopping opportunities ranging from gold , spice markets and souqs, to modern boutiques presenting the latest fashions and beautiful local handicrafts. You can find all what you need in malls, like Mecca mall and city mall. You can also enjoy shopping in the old markets of downtown Amman . Evening back to hotel for dinner and overnight .

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Amman – QAIA","day_summary":"

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, our TravelXploria representative will assist you with your transfer to Queen Alia International Airport (QAIA) for your departure. We ensure a smooth and comfortable journey as you conclude your memorable trip with us, wishing you safe travels and looking forward to welcoming you again.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Amman","to":"Amman Queen Alia International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival in Amman – Visit King Abdullah Mosque and Cave of the Seven Sleepers, check-in at hotel.
  • Explore the Dead Sea, visit Prophet Lot’s Cave and Maqamats in Jordan Valley, return to Amman.
  •  Departure from Queen Alia International Airport after breakfast.​

Upon arrival at Queen Alia International Airport in Amman, you will be met and assisted by our Travelxploria representative, who will handle visa formalities. Begin your tour of Amman with a visit to the King Abdullah Mosque, completed in 1990 and famously known as the Blue Dome Mosque due to its striking sky-blue exterior. Continue your journey to Al Raqim, home to the legendary Cave of the Seven Sleepers, mentioned in the Holy Quran in Surah Al-Kahf. Located about 10 km east of Amman, this site reflects the miraculous story of the youths whom God put to sleep for 309 solar years, awakening in a time when Christianity had spread widely. The site features Byzantine and Roman ruins and a mosque that aligns with the descriptions in Islamic tradition. In the evening, drive back to Amman for hotel check-in, dinner, and overnight stay.

packages.overview:
• ​Experience pristine views of golden shores and turquoise waters at Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi, a Maldives Beach Resort with modern amenities and a vibrant ambiance. The Premium All Inclusive resort offers accommodation for surfers, honeymooners, and families and includes free excursions for stays over five nights, along with daily snorkeling tours. Dive in to see what room category suits you best, to experience the best of the Maldives.
  • ​Adaaran Select Huduranfushi boasts a multi faceted dining experience at its Maldives Hotel Restaurants with spectacular views accompanying almost every meal. Start the day with a breakfast buffet and enjoy ethnic dishes, international cuisine or light snacks in a variety of restaurants and cafes. Choose from a range of fresh sea food and create a meal to your liking while you enjoy the ever changing views of the Indian Ocean.
  • Indulge in a candle lit dinner or celebrate and sip a glass of wine and relax to the soothing sounds of the ocean at the Sunset Bar and Restaurant, the resort’s signature cafe. Themed buffet style meals at our distinctive Maldives Hotel restaurants offer a combination of Maldivian and international cuisines to tempt discerning tastes nightly.

  • A fun, chilled-out balance is at the heart of the dining experience at the limited-service all day dining restaurant, Element X. Immerse in a multi-layered experience at the lively X360 bar – with a uniquely interactive, fun, and exuberant ambience.

packages.overview:
• The Maldives is a tropical island nation located in the Indian Ocean, southwest of Sri Lanka and India. Comprising 26 atolls and over 1,000 coral islands, the Maldives is renowned for its crystal-clear turquoise waters, powdery white-sand beaches, luxurious overwater villas, and vibrant coral reefs. It is one of the world’s most sought-after honeymoon and luxury travel destinations.

  • The Maldives pioneered the concept of luxurious water villas with direct lagoon access.

  • Home to some of the most diverse and vibrant marine ecosystems, ideal for diving and snorkeling.

Located just 25 minutes from Malé, this island offers the perfect blend of serenity and luxury. After a delightful breakfast, the day is yours to enjoy. Indulge in snorkeling right from the beach and witness vibrant coral reefs teeming with marine life. For the adventurous, optional activities like scuba diving, windsurfing, or a sunset dolphin cruise are available. Or simply bask in the sun with a good book. End your day with a delicious buffet dinner and enjoy the peaceful island ambiance. Overnight at Thulhagiri.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Rejuvenation & Relaxation","day_summary":"

Start your morning with a peaceful beach walk or yoga session. Later, treat yourself at the resort’s spa with a rejuvenating massage or wellness therapy. Take in the island’s natural beauty, swim in the lagoon, or try kayaking. As the sun sets, enjoy a romantic candlelight dinner by the beach. Overnight stay in your villa at Thulhagiri Island Resort.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure with Beautiful Memories","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from the resort and take a speedboat back to Malé International Airport for your flight. Leave with unforgettable memories of your relaxing tropical retreat in the Maldives.

packages.package_name: Egyptian Extravaganza with Nile River Cruise
packages.overview:
​1: Arrival in Cairo, meet & greet by Travelxploria representative, transfer to hotel, check-in, and briefing for the next day.
​2: Explore the Pyramids, Sphinx, and Egyptian Museum with a guided tour.
​3: Fly to Luxor, visit the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon, Karnak Temple, and Luxor Temple.
​4: Transfer to Esna, embark on Dahabiya Nile Cruise, visit Esna Temple, and sail to El Kab.
​5: Explore rock temples, visit Edfu Temple, sail to El Fawaz, and enjoy a campfire dinner.
​6: Sail to Gebel El Silsila, visit Horemheb Temple, enjoy tea and shisha, then visit Kom Ombo Temple.
​7: Visit Daraw village and camel market, sail towards Aswan, and overnight on Dahabiya.
​8: Disembark in Aswan, transfer to hotel, and enjoy a free day.
​9: Transfer to Aswan Airport, fly to Cairo, and check in at the hotel.
​10: Transfer to Cairo International Airport for final departure.​

Day Tour - Pyramids, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will take you on an unforgettable journey through ancient Egypt, starting with the iconic Pyramids of Giza. Witness the awe-inspiring Great Pyramid of Cheops, the only surviving wonder of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, along with the well-preserved Pyramid of Chephren and the Pyramid of Mycerinus. Nearby, marvel at the enigmatic Sphinx, a magnificent structure carved from a natural rocky outcrop, with its lion’s body stretching 45 meters and paws extending 15 meters. The tour continues with a visit to the world-renowned Egyptian Museum, where you will spend two fascinating hours exploring its vast collection, including the treasures of King Tutankhamun, highlighted by his exquisite golden mask.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Luxor","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Fly to Luxor - West Bank & East bank visits","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will assist you with check-out and transfer to Cairo Airport for your flight to Luxor. Upon arrival, begin your exploration of Luxor’s West Bank with a visit to the Valley of the Kings, where the tombs of ancient pharaohs, including Tutankhamun (optional entry), hold centuries of history. Your guide will provide insights into these magnificent tombs before you continue to the breathtaking Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a stop at the imposing Colossi of Memnon. After checking in at your hotel at 3 PM, set out to explore the grand Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. Be mesmerized by its colossal pillars, towering obelisks, and intricate kiosks, a testament to 2,000 years of construction. The journey continues with a visit to the Luxor Temple, dedicated to Amun, the supreme god of the New Empire. After this enriching experience, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Luxor.

After breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria's representative will assist you with check-out and transfer to Esna, located 50 km south, the home port of your Dahabiya. Embark on a breathtaking 5-day cruise along the Nile from Esna to Aswan. Begin with a visit to the Esna Temple, followed by a stroll through the vibrant local markets. Sail onward to El Kab, the ancient town of Nekheb, where you will explore the remnants of its temples and discover tombs carved into the cliffs. As the journey continues, set sail to a serene island where the boat will moor for the night. Enjoy a delightful dinner on board or along the peaceful banks of the Nile before settling in for an overnight stay on the Dahabiya.

Cruise.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Saling to Edfu - El Fawaz","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Travelxploria's representative will guide you to explore the magnificent rock temple and the remains of ancient monuments in the old quarries. As life along the riverbanks comes to life with fishermen beginning their daily work, relax on the sundeck while the crew sets sail towards Edfu. Visit the awe-inspiring Temple of Horus, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the falcon god. The temple’s inner walls are adorned with intricate inscriptions, making it a true library carved in stone. As the day ends, sail to a tranquil Nile island, where you will enjoy a magical dinner around a campfire before spending the night onboard the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gebal EL Selsila - Kom Ombo","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast onboard the Dahabiya while sailing towards the remarkable Selselah Temple, where the Nile flows at its narrowest between two mountain ranges. Travelxploria's representative will accompany you as you explore this fascinating site, typically untouched by large Nile cruisers. Visit the small temple of Horemheb and walk through the historic sandstone quarries, where ancient Egyptians sourced stone for their most renowned temples. Afterward, relax at a charming café while savoring traditional tea and shisha (waterpipe). Continue sailing to a picturesque riverbank for a delightful lunch onboard before visiting the stunning Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to the crocodile god Sobek and Haroeris. Conclude your day with a delicious dinner and overnight stay onboard the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Daraw - Aswan","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast onboard the Dahabiya as the captain sets sail for the village of Daraw, once the final stop for camel traders journeying from Sudan after a forty-day trek through the Libyan Desert. Travelxploria's representative will guide you on a fascinating walk through the village and its vibrant camel market, offering a glimpse into this historic trade hub. After immersing yourself in the local culture, the journey continues as the boat sails towards Aswan, where you will enjoy a delightful dinner and an overnight stay onboard the Dahabiya.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Aswan","country":"Egypt","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Aswan/1744964997601-AdobeStock_277249112.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Aswan/1744964998368-AdobeStock_310960152.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":" Disembarkation in Aswan","day_summary":"

Enjoy your final breakfast onboard the Dahabiya before disembarking. Travelxploria's representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to your hotel in Aswan, where you will check in and have the rest of the day free to explore at your leisure. Relax and unwind before spending the night at your hotel in Aswan.

packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A land of ancient wonders, breathtaking landscapes, and diverse cultural experiences.

  2. Cairo: The heart of Egypt, home to the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and bustling markets like Khan El Khalili.

  3. Aswan: A scenic city on the Nile, known for the Philae Temple, Abu Simbel, Unfinished Obelisk, and peaceful Felucca rides.

  4. Hurghada: A Red Sea paradise, offering pristine beaches, snorkeling, scuba diving, and desert adventures.

Timeless Wonders ","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast at your hotel, preparing for an extraordinary journey through Egypt’s most iconic sites. Our Travelxploria representative and Private Egyptologist guide will accompany you to the legendary Great Pyramids of Giza—Cheops, Chephren, and Mykerinos—where history stands tall. Marvel at the mysterious Sphinx and explore the sacred Valley Temple, steeped in ancient rituals.

In the afternoon, delve into Old Coptic Cairo, where you’ll visit the Hanging Church, the historic Ben Ezra Synagogue, and the revered Holy Family Church. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay in Cairo

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Aswan","country":"Egypt","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Aswan/1744964997601-AdobeStock_277249112.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Aswan/1744964998368-AdobeStock_310960152.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Aswan & The Nile Cruise Begins","day_summary":"

Enjoy a delicious breakfast at your hotel, then meet our Travelxploria representative for a seamless transfer to the airport for your flight to Aswan. Upon arrival, our team will greet you and introduce you to your Private English-speaking guide for a fascinating tour of Aswan High Dam, a modern marvel controlling the Nile’s mighty waters. Next, visit the enchanting Philae Temple, dedicated to the goddess Isis, where myths and history intertwine.

After exploring Aswan’s treasures, board your luxurious Nile cruise ship and settle into your cabin. Enjoy a delightful lunch and dinner onboard, as you prepare for an unforgettable journey along the legendary Nile River. Overnight on the cruise in Aswan.

Wake up to a delightful breakfast onboard, surrounded by the tranquil beauty of the Nile River. As your cruise sets sail towards Kom Ombo, step ashore to explore the Temple of Kom Ombo, a unique double temple dedicated to Sobek, the crocodile god, and Horus, the falcon god. Marvel at its stunning carvings and learn about the ancient medical instruments once used here.

Continue your journey to Edfu, enjoying a delicious lunch on board as you glide past timeless riverbanks. Upon arrival, relax and savor a sumptuous dinner onboard, preparing for another day of exploration. Overnight stay on the cruise in Edfu.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploring the Temple of Horus ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast onboard before stepping ashore in Edfu to visit the magnificent Temple of Horus, one of Egypt’s best-preserved temples. Dedicated to the falcon-headed god Horus, this grand structure offers a glimpse into the power and devotion of ancient Egyptian civilization.Return to the cruise as it sails toward Luxor, offering breathtaking views of the Nile’s timeless landscapes. Enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner onboard, soaking in the serene ambiance of the river. Overnight stay on the cruise in Luxor, preparing for an exciting exploration of its legendary temples.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Hurghada","country":"Egypt","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Egypt/Hurghada/1744965093518-AdobeStock_210079817.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Ancient Wonders to Red Sea Paradise ","day_summary":"

Start your morning with a delicious breakfast onboard, then meet our Travelxploria representative and private Egyptologist guide for an unforgettable journey through the West Bank of Luxor. Explore the legendary Valley of the Kings, where pharaohs rest in elaborately decorated tombs, visit the stunning Hatshepsut Temple, a masterpiece of ancient architecture, and stand in awe before the towering Colossi of Memnon.

After your tour, disembark from the cruise and travel in a comfortable private van to Hurghada, a scenic 4-5 hour drive through Egypt’s changing landscapes. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and relax by the Red Sea, ready to embrace the coastal beauty. Overnight stay in Hurghada.

Wake up to a refreshing breakfast at your hotel, ready to indulge in a day of pure relaxation in Hurghada. Bask in the sun along the pristine Red Sea beaches, take a dip in the crystal-clear waters, or simply unwind at your resort, soaking in the serene coastal vibes.

Enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner at the hotel, savoring the flavors of Egyptian and international cuisine. Whether you choose to explore the vibrant Hurghada Marina, go snorkeling in the coral reefs, or relax by the pool, the day is yours to enjoy. Overnight stay in Hurghada.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Another Day in Paradise – Hurghada Retreat","day_summary":"

Wake up to a sumptuous breakfast at your hotel, ready to embrace another blissful day in the Egyptian Riviera. Whether you choose to relax by the beach, take a refreshing swim in the crystal-clear Red Sea, or explore the vibrant Hurghada Marina, the day is yours to enjoy at your own pace.

Savor a delicious lunch and dinner at your hotel, indulging in exquisite flavors as you soak in the tranquil coastal ambiance. Unwind under the starry sky, feeling the gentle sea breeze before retreating to your comfortable room. Overnight stay in Hurghada.

Start your final morning in Egypt with a delicious breakfast at your hotel, reflecting on the unforgettable journey through ancient wonders, the serene Nile, and the breathtaking Red Sea.

Our Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free transfer to Cairo International Airport, assisting you with all departure formalities. As you board your flight back to your final destination, take with you cherished memories of Egypt’s rich history, warm hospitality, and mesmerizing landscapes.

Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for another incredible adventure!

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Leh (3,505 m / 11,567 ft)
    Arrive at Leh airport and transfer to your hotel for rest and acclimatization.
    Enjoy a relaxed evening soaking in the high-altitude atmosphere.

  2. Leh – Alchi – Lamayuru – Alchi/Ulleytokpo (180 km)
    Drive through dramatic landscapes to visit the moon-like terrain of Lamayuru and the ancient Alchi Monastery.
    Stay overnight in the peaceful village of Alchi or Ulleytokpo.

  3. Alchi/Ulleytokpo – Leh (70 km)
    Return to Leh with scenic stops along the way including Magnetic Hill and Sangam Point.
    Spend the evening at leisure in Leh’s colorful market or cafes.

  4. Leh → Nubra Valley via Khardung La (120 km, 4–5 hrs)
    Drive over Khardung La, the world’s highest motorable pass.
    Arrive in Nubra Valley and explore the Hunder sand dunes with optional camel rides.

  5. Visit Diskit Monastery
    After breakfast, visit the 515-year-old Diskit Monastery with its massive Maitreya Buddha statue.
    Enjoy breathtaking views of the valley from the monastery hilltop.

  6. Tour of Pangong Lake
    Travel via the scenic Shayok route to the beautiful Pangong Lake.
    Relax by the lake and admire its ever-changing shades of blue.

  7. Pangong → Leh via Hemis Monastery
    Return to Leh with a visit to Hemis Monastery, the largest and richest in Ladakh.
    Enjoy your last evening in Leh with some local shopping or rest.

  8. Depart Leh
    Transfer to Leh airport for your return journey.
    Depart with unforgettable memories of Ladakh’s landscapes and culture.

Upon arrival at Kushok Bakula Airport, Leh (3500m above sea level), our Travelxploria representative will assist with your transfer to the hotel. Enjoy a delicious breakfast at the hotel before 09:30 am. The rest of the morning will be free for rest and acclimatization.

After lunch at the hotel, you will be driven to visit Shanti Stupa and Leh Palace, with the chance to explore the local area. In the evening, take a leisurely stroll around the local market.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

Thereafter, our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will lead you to the Likir Monastery, where you’ll marvel at the splendid three-story Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues. Continue your journey to the Indus & Zanskar River Sangam, and drive along the Indus River, stopping to visit the Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and Magnetic Hill (where cars defy gravity).

Next, enjoy a short hike to Basgo Palace before proceeding to the Leh Hall of Fame, which houses a museum dedicated to the Kargil War memorabilia.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

After an early breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you on a scenic drive to Pangong Lake (14,500 ft), passing through Changla Pass (17,350 ft), the third highest motorable road in the world. Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, which is the highest saltwater lake in the world, shared by India and China, you'll have time to admire the stunning beauty of the lake. Relax by the shores, marveling at the changing colors and the fascinating high-altitude setting of the lake.

Overnight stay at the camp.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Manali – Reach the beautiful hill town and prepare for your Himalayan journey.

  2. Manali – Sarchu (222 km / 4000m) – Drive over scenic high mountain passes to the campsite at Sarchu.

  3. Sarchu – Leh (220 km) – Journey through rugged terrain crossing Nakee La, Lachung La, and Tanglang La.

  4. Drive Sham Valley & Alchi (70 km) – Explore Magnetic Hill, Sangam Point, and the ancient Alchi Monastery.

  5. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder Sand Dunes (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross Khardung La and experience desert scenery and double-humped camels.

  6. Visit Diskit Monastery – Visit the 515-year-old hilltop monastery with stunning valley views.

  7. Nubra – Pangong Lake via Shey & Thiksey (155 km) – Drive through Shayok Valley with visits to iconic monasteries en route to the magical Pangong Lake.

  8. Pangong – Leh via Hemis Monastery (170 km) – Return to Leh, stopping at Hemis—the richest monastery in Ladakh.

  9. Depart Leh – Transfer to the airport for your onward flight with cherished memories.

On arrival in Manali, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and assist with a smooth transfer to your hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax and enjoy the serene surroundings.

The day is free for leisure and acclimatization, allowing you to unwind and explore at your own pace. In the evening, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will accompany you on a leisurely walk around the local market, where you can browse traditional handicrafts and soak in the vibrant atmosphere.

Our best on-ground support staff will ensure a comfortable and hassle-free experience throughout your stay.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast/Dinner included)

Early in the morning, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on a thrilling journey to Sarchu. Travel through the breathtaking Rohtang Pass (3,955 meters), soaking in stunning views of the Lahaul Valley, passing through Tandi, Keylong, and Jispa.

En route, take a refreshing lunch break at Darcha, where our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will share insights about the region’s unique terrain and culture.

After lunch, continue your drive through the majestic Baralacha Pass (4,845 meters), witnessing its rugged beauty before reaching Sarchu, where our best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless check-in at your campsite.

Overnight stay at the camp.

After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on an exhilarating drive to Leh, crossing some of the highest motorable passes in the world.

With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide providing fascinating insights, travel through Tanglang La (5,350 meters), the second-highest motorable road in the world, and Lachung La (5,065 meters), both offering breathtaking panoramic views of the rugged Himalayan terrain.

Upon arrival in Leh, our best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless check-in at your hotel, where you can relax and unwind after a thrilling day.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will provide you with a packed lunch for the day as you embark on an enriching sightseeing tour.

Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, begin your journey with a visit to the 1,000-year-old Alchi Monastery, the only Gompa in Ladakh situated on flat ground, offering a glimpse into ancient Buddhist art and culture. Next, proceed to the Likir Monastery, where you’ll be awestruck by the splendid three-story Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues dominating the landscape.

Continue to the spectacular Indus & Zanskar river Sangam, where the two rivers merge in a striking contrast of colors. Drive along the Indus River, visiting the revered Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and witnessing the mysterious phenomenon at Magnetic Hill, where cars appear to defy gravity.

Explore Basgo Palace, accessible via a short hike, and later, visit the Leh Hall of Fame, a museum dedicated to the bravery of Indian soldiers with memorabilia from the Kargil War.

Our best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless experience throughout the day.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

Nubra Valley and Hundur Sand Dunes – Drive 120 Kms 4/5hrs","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on an exciting journey to Nubra Valley, traversing the legendary Khardung La Pass (18,380 ft)—the highest motorable road in the world. Enjoy breathtaking views of the snow-clad mountains as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide shares fascinating insights about the region’s history and culture.

Arrive at Hundur by afternoon, where our best on-ground support staff will ensure a smooth check-in at your camp. After a delicious lunch, you’ll have the rest of the day free to explore Deskit and Hunder villages, immersing yourself in the unique charm of Ladakh.

In the evening, experience an unforgettable camel safari in the enchanting sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village, where the double-humped Bactrian camels add to the magical desert landscape.

Overnight stay at the camp. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

Following the monastery visit, begin your journey back to Leh, retracing the scenic route via the mighty Khardung La Pass (18,380 ft). Our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will enrich the journey with insights into the strategic and cultural significance of this high-altitude marvel.

Arrive in Leh by afternoon, where our best on-ground support staff will assist with check-in at your hotel. The evening is free for you to leisurely explore the vibrant Leh market, where you can shop for local handicrafts, souvenirs, and traditional Ladakhi artifacts.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

of Pangong Lake- It is the highest land locked lake (155 Kms One way) enroute Shey & Thiksey","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on a mesmerizing journey to Pangong Lake (14,500 ft). Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, travel through the breathtaking Changla Pass (17,350 ft)—the third highest motorable road in the world, offering spectacular mountain views.

Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, be captivated by its pristine blue waters and the surreal beauty of this high-altitude saltwater lake, which is uniquely shared by India and China. Marvel at the ever-changing colors of the lake, ranging from deep blue to turquoise, depending on the sunlight and the time of day.

Our best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless check-in at your camp near the lake, allowing you to relax and soak in the tranquility of this magical destination.

Overnight stay at the camp. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Manali – Begin your trans-Himalayan adventure in the charming hill town of Manali.

  2. Manali – Sarchu (222 km / 4000 m) – Drive through the high passes of the Himalayas to reach Sarchu.

  3. Sarchu – Tsomoriri (220 km / 6 hrs) – Travel to the serene high-altitude Tsomoriri Lake, home to migratory birds.

  4. Tsomoriri – Leh (240 km / 7–8 hrs) – Scenic journey through remote landscapes and mountain passes to Leh.

  5. Drive to Sham Valley & Alchi (70 km) – Visit Sangam Point, Magnetic Hill, and the historic Alchi Monastery.

  6. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross the world’s highest motorable road into Nubra’s desert-like expanse.

  7. Visit Diskit Monastery – Explore Ladakh’s oldest monastery and its giant Maitreya Buddha statue.

  8. Nubra – Pangong Lake via Shey & Thiksey (155 km) – Drive through Shayok Valley and visit iconic monasteries en route to Pangong.

  9. Pangong – Leh via Hemis Monastery (170 km) – Return to Leh with a visit to the famous Hemis Monastery on the way.

  10. Depart Leh – Transfer to the airport with unforgettable memories of Ladakh’s majestic landscapes.

Early in the morning, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on a scenic journey to Sarchu. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, travel through the breathtaking Rohtang Pass (3,955 meters), Lahaul Valley, Tandi, Keylong, and Jispa, with a refreshing lunch break at Darcha.

After lunch, continue the drive to Sarchu, passing through the majestic Baralacha Pass (4,845 meters). Throughout the journey, our best on-ground support staff will ensure your comfort and seamless travel experience.

Overnight stay at the camp in Sarchu.

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you set off on a scenic drive to Pang. En route, with guidance from our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, you may spot wild animals roaming freely in their natural habitat. Pang is a tiny, seasonal market along the Leh-Manali route, operated by Ladakhi traders who migrate here from mid-June to September.

Crossing Pang, the journey continues uphill before reaching an expansive 60 km-long plain stretch, leading to the base of Tanglang La Pass (5,400 meters). Upon arrival at Tsomoriri, our team will facilitate a smooth check-in at your fixed camp.

Later, visit the picturesque lakefront and the small settlement of huts, soaking in the breathtaking beauty of Tsomoriri Lake, located 4,573 meters above sea level in southeast Leh. With its pearl-like shape and rich mineral deposits, the lake spans a 36 km circumference. Here, our best on-ground support staff will assist you in registering and obtaining the necessary permits.

Overnight stay at the camp.

Enjoy breathtaking views along the way as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide shares fascinating insights about the region’s history and geography.

Arrive at Hundar by afternoon, where our best on-ground support staff will ensure a smooth check-in at your camp. After a refreshing lunch, spend the rest of the day exploring Deskit and Hundar villages, soaking in the serene beauty of the valley. Don’t miss the thrilling camel safari on the sand dunes between Deskit and Hundar, an experience unique to this region.

Overnight stay at the camp.

packages.overview:
• Historic Almaty City Tour – Explore Panfilov Park, Zenkov Cathedral, Green Bazaar, and Kok Tobe with breathtaking city views.

  • Adventurous Jeep Tour – Traverse Altyn Emel National Park’s stunning landscapes, ancient Aktau Mountains, and a mystical 700-year-old osier tree.

  • Singing Dune Phenomenon – Witness the natural wonder of a dune that hums like an organ, surrounded by mesmerizing desert views.

  • Zharkent & Charyn Canyon – Discover a cultural gem near China’s border before exploring the awe-inspiring “Valley of Castles” rock formations.

  • Enchanting Kolsay Lakes – Trek through the pristine Tien Shan Mountains, sail on emerald waters, or take an optional horseback ride.

  • Mystical Kaindy Lake – Marvel at submerged trees standing eerily in crystal-clear waters, a surreal result of a century-old earthquake.

  • Picturesque Medeo & Shymbulak – Visit the world’s highest skating rink and Kazakhstan’s premier ski resort for panoramic mountain views.

  • Sunkar Falcon Show – Experience a thrilling demonstration of Kazakh eagle hunting traditions with majestic birds of prey.

  • Serene Park of the First President – Stroll through beautifully landscaped gardens offering peace and scenic beauty.

[{"city":"Almaty","country":"Kazakhstan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Almaty/1741632427800-AdobeStock_128356610-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Almaty/1741632428469-AdobeStock_138734594-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Almaty/1741632428740-AdobeStock_156091824-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Almaty: A Seamless Welcome & City Exploration","day_summary":"


Upon arrival at Almaty International Airport, smoothly pass through border control and baggage claim, where Travelxploria’s dedicated representative awaits with a personalized nameplate. Enjoy a hassle-free transfer to your hotel for check-in (available from 14:00). Begin your exclusive Almaty sightseeing journey, starting at the Park of 28 Panfilov Guardsmen, home to the Ascension Cathedral and Eternal Flame Memorial. Immerse yourself in the vibrant Green Bazaar, indulging in authentic local delicacies. After a delightful lunch, ascend to Kok Tobe Park via cable car for breathtaking city views. End your day with a seamless transfer back to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Almaty International Airport","to":"Almaty","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":361,"h_name":"Royal Park Hotel","h_country":"Kazakhstan","h_city":"Almaty","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Royal Park Hotel/1739515226058-Royal Park Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Royal Park Hotel/1739515226191-Royal Park Hotel.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":363,"h_name":"Almaty Grand Erbil Hotel","h_country":"Kazakhstan","h_city":"Almaty","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Almaty Grand Erbil Hotel/1739515549122-Almaty Grand Erbil Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Almaty Grand Erbil Hotel/1739515549215-Almaty Grand Erbil Hotel.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":366,"h_name":"Hotel Royal Tulip","h_country":"Kazakhstan","h_city":"Almaty","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Hotel Royal Tulip/1739515977410-Hotel Royal Tulip 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Hotel Royal Tulip/1739515977514-Hotel Royal Tulip 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Almaty/Hotel Royal Tulip/1739515977554-Hotel Royal Tulip.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Jeep Expedition: Altyn Emel National Park & Lunar Landscapes","day_summary":"

Start your adventure with an early breakfast before embarking on a thrilling jeep tour across the breathtaking Almaty region. Travel 255 km to Altyn Emel National Park, a vast and diverse sanctuary of majestic landscapes and rich wildlife. After a delicious lunch at a guesthouse, explore the mesmerizing Aktau White Mountains, a 400-million-year-old geological wonder known for its surreal mix of blue, white, pink, red, and green hues. Visit the legendary 700-year-old osier tree, steeped in mystery and wisdom. Return to the guesthouse for a hearty dinner and a peaceful overnight stay amidst nature’s splendor.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Singing Dunes, Zharkent & Charyn Canyon Adventure","day_summary":"

Continue your exploration of Altyn Emel National Park with a visit to the mystical Singing Dunes, a natural wonder that produces organ-like melodies when the sand shifts in dry weather. Enjoy the breathtaking panoramic views before heading to Zharkent, a charming town near the Chinese border. Discover its unique blend of cultures by visiting the Dungan Mosque, local church, and bustling market.After a delicious lunch at a local café, journey to Charyn National Park, where the spectacular Valley of Castles awaits. Hike through towering red rock formations down to the Charyn River, immersing yourself in the canyon’s surreal beauty. By evening, arrive at a guesthouse or Mountain Resort near Kolsay Lakes, where you’ll unwind over a hearty dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kolsay Lakes – The Pearl of Tien Shan","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at the guesthouse or Mountain Resort, followed by a journey to the breathtaking Kolsay Lakes, known as the \"Necklace of Tien Shan.\" Nestled in the Northern Tien Shan Mountains near the Kyrgyzstan border, these pristine lakes sit at elevations of 1,800m, 2,300m, and 2,900m, surrounded by lush coniferous forests and towering peaks.For adventure seekers, a 3-4 hour trek from the first to the second lake offers a scenic escape (lunch boxes included). Alternatively, opt for a horseback ride or simply relax by the crystal-clear waters, enjoying the serene atmosphere. Boat rentals are also available for a tranquil sail. Dinner and overnight stay at a cozy guesthouse or Mountain Resort.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kaindy Lake – The Submerged Forest of Kazakhstan","day_summary":"

After breakfast and checkout, embark on a scenic journey to the mystical Kaindy Lake, a natural wonder formed after a powerful earthquake in 1911. This emerald-green lake, nestled within a gorge, submerged an entire coniferous forest, leaving the tree trunks eerily rising above the water—a sight unlike any other. The lake’s frigid waters have preserved these trees for over a century, making it a must-see marvel.

Reaching Kaindy Lake requires a short trek from the hilltop, offering breathtaking panoramic views. Alternatively, opt for a horseback ride provided by locals for an authentic experience.

On the way back, stop by a traditional village house for a delicious homemade lunch, then relax as you make your way back to Almaty for hotel check-in and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploring Almaty’s Mountain Wonders & Falconry Tradition","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on an exciting journey to explore Almaty’s breathtaking natural wonders. Begin with the majestic Ili Alatau Mountains, a vast national park stretching 120 km with elevations reaching up to 5,000 meters. Visit Medeo, home to the world’s highest-altitude ice-skating rink at 1,690 meters, before ascending to the renowned Shymbulak Mountain Resort at 2,260 meters, a once rugged ski spot now transformed into a modern alpine retreat. Continue to Sunkar Falcon Farm, where you will witness a mesmerizing falconry show featuring majestic birds of prey, a cherished tradition of Kazakh culture. Conclude the day with a visit to the Park of the First President before returning to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Early morning, our Travelxploria representative will provide a seamless transfer to Almaty International Airport for your departure. Reflect on your unforgettable journey through Kazakhstan’s breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and cultural wonders. With cherished memories and incredible experiences, bid farewell to this enchanting land. Wishing you a safe and pleasant flight.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Almaty","to":"Almaty International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Kazakhstan: The largest Central Asian country, known for its diverse landscapes, rich history, and modern cities.

  • Almaty: The cultural and financial hub, surrounded by mountains, featuring Kok-Tobe Hill, Shymbulak Ski Resort, Medeu Ice Rink, and Big Almaty Lake.

  • Turkestan: A historical gem, home to the Mausoleum of Khoja Ahmed Yasawi, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and an important spiritual center.

  • Shymkent: A lively city blending Silk Road heritage with modern attractions, including Aksu-Zhabagly Nature Reserve and bustling bazaars.

  • Astana (Nur-Sultan): The futuristic capital, boasting Bayterek Tower, Hazrat Sultan Mosque, Khan Shatyr Mall, and Expo 2017 complex.

Conclude at Kok Tobe Park, enjoying a cable car ride with breathtaking city views. Return to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Escape into the breathtaking natural wonders of Kazakhstan on this exclusive Travelxploria day tour, guided by our experienced local expert. Begin your journey with a delectable breakfast and hotel pick-up, setting off towards the stunning Kolsai Lake, often called the \"Pearls of the Tien Shan,\" where you can soak in the serenity of alpine waters. Next, marvel at the mystical submerged forest of Kaindy Lake, a surreal sight with towering tree trunks emerging from crystal-clear waters. Finally, explore the dramatic landscapes of Charyn Canyon, often compared to the Grand Canyon, with its striking red rock formations. After an unforgettable adventure, relax on your ride back with a seamless hotel drop-off, bringing a perfect end to your scenic escapade.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before departing for the Huns Ethno-Village, a captivating retreat into Kazakhstan’s nomadic heritage. Nestled in the picturesque Talgar district, this unique experience showcases traditional Kazakh customs, horse games, and rituals. Enjoy mesmerizing performances, from felt craft demonstrations to horseback wrestling and dynamic folk dances. Participate in a baursak cooking masterclass and savor an authentic Kazakh lunch. Optional horseback riding tours let you explore the stunning surroundings. After this unforgettable cultural journey, return to Almaty for a relaxing evening before catching an overnight train to Turkestan, ready for the next adventure.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Turkestan","country":"Kazakhstan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Explore Turkestan","day_summary":"

Arrive in Turkestan and transfer to the hotel for breakfast and check-in. Begin your day exploring the UNESCO-listed Mausoleum of Khodja Ahmet Yassawi, a stunning 14th-century architectural marvel and an important Islamic pilgrimage site. Continue your historical journey to the ancient city of Sauran, where remnants of massive fortress walls tell tales of a once-thriving medieval city. Later, visit the Karavansaray complex, an immersive cultural hub offering captivating performances, interactive experiences, and modern entertainment rooted in Kazakh traditions. After a day of rich cultural exploration, unwind at your hotel for an overnight stay in Turkestan.

En route, visit the Shaulder Museum and the 12th-century Mausoleum of Arystan-Bab, a revered pilgrimage site in Central Asia. Continue to Shymkent, a vibrant city blending history and modernity. Upon arrival, enjoy a delicious local lunch, followed by a short city tour showcasing its cultural highlights. After checking in at your hotel, relax and enjoy your free time exploring the city's charming atmosphere. Conclude the day with an overnight stay in Shymkent.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Astana\"]","inserted_id":"[282]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Astana/Astana City Tour/1740638454901-istockphoto-527693069-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Astana/Astana City Tour/1740638454974-istockphoto-674452628-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Astana/Astana City Tour/1740638455006-istockphoto-1168131264-612x612.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Astana Grand Tour","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on a full-day sightseeing tour of Astana from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Begin at the Palace of Peace and Reconciliation, a 62-meter pyramid designed by the renowned architect Norman Foster, symbolizing unity and harmony. Next, visit the majestic Hazret Sultan Mosque, the second-largest mosque in Central Asia, accommodating up to 10,000 worshippers. Explore the National Museum, the largest in Kazakhstan, featuring ten thematic halls showcasing the nation's rich history. Finally, experience the futuristic \"Nur Alem\" Pavilion, a 100-meter-tall sphere and the legacy of EXPO 2017, offering an interactive journey through renewable energy innovations. Return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Early morning transfer to Astana International Airport for your departure flight. Bid farewell to Kazakhstan after an unforgettable journey through its breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. Our team ensures a smooth transfer, allowing you to relax and cherish the memories made during this incredible adventure. Safe travels!

packages.overview:
• Captivating Almaty City Tour – Explore Panfilov Park, Zenkov Cathedral, and Republic Square, then ride a cable car to Chimbulak for breathtaking mountain views.

  • Spectacular Charyn Canyon Adventure – Discover majestic red cliffs, hike through the Valley of Castles, and experience Kazakhstan’s jaw-dropping natural wonders.

  • Enchanting Issyk Lake & Golden Man Tomb – Visit a scenic alpine lake, explore Kazakhstan’s ancient history, and admire stunning Tian Shan Mountain panoramas.

  • Futuristic Astana Sightseeing – Marvel at the city’s ultramodern skyline, visit Bayterek Tower, Khan Shatyr, and explore the Old Center’s historic charm.

  • Emotional Visit to ALZHIR Memorial – Pay tribute at this historical Stalin-era site, then explore Palace of Peace and EXPO’s futuristic Nur Alem complex.
