Begin your day as our Travelxploria representative and driver meet you at the hotel lobby for an immersive sightseeing tour of Almaty. Explore the historical charm of Panfilov Park and the architectural beauty of Zenkov Cathedral before visiting the Central State Museum (closed on Tuesdays) and Republic Square. In the afternoon, take a scenic drive to Chimbulak Ski Resort, where a thrilling cable car ride unveils the breathtaking snow-capped peaks of the Tian Shan Mountains. Conclude the day at Sunkar Falcon Farm (closed on Mondays) for a spectacular hawk show, an authentic glimpse into Kazakh traditions. Return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Charyn Canyon Adventure ","day_summary":"

Embark on a breathtaking journey as our Travelxploria representative and driver pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Charyn Canyon (220 km, 3-4 hours). This natural masterpiece in eastern Kazakhstan showcases spectacular rock formations, vibrant cliffs, and the iconic Valley of Castles, resembling ancient towers. Nestled within Charyn National Park, it also houses the renowned Ash Tree Grove. The stunning landscapes make the long journey worthwhile, leaving an everlasting impression. Enjoy a picturesque picnic, take a leisurely walk through the canyon, and soak in the unparalleled beauty before returning to Almaty for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Astana","country":"Kazakhstan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Astana/1741632448183-AdobeStock_365248691-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Astana/1741632448783-AdobeStock_897237495-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Kazakhstan/Astana/1741632448982-AdobeStock_1151846528-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Serene Escape to Issyk Lake & Flight to Astana","day_summary":"


Begin your day with a seamless pickup by our Travelxploria representative and driver for a picturesque drive to Issyk Lake (64 km, 1 hour). En route, visit the iconic Tomb of the Golden Man, a symbol of Kazakhstan’s rich heritage. As you ascend to 1,756m above sea level, admire the breathtaking views of the Tian Shan Mountains and Issyk Natural Park. Upon arrival, enjoy leisure time by the tranquil lake. In the afternoon, return to Almaty and transfer to the airport for your flight to Astana, where our representative will greet you and escort you to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Ritz-Carlton, Astana/1744800655951-The Ritz-Carlton, Astana.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Astana: A Blend of Heritage & Modern Marvels","day_summary":"


Begin your Astana city tour with a seamless pickup by our Travelxploria representative from your hotel. Explore the historic Old Center, once a thriving merchant town. In the afternoon, stroll along the Millennium Axis, a visionary masterpiece by Kisho Kurokawa, admiring landmarks like the Opera House and the Round Square fountains. Walk along the Nurzhol and Green Water boulevards, surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers. At Bayterek Monument, take in a breathtaking panoramic view of the city. Conclude your day at Khan Shatyr, a stunning shopping and entertainment complex. Transfer back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Astana & Alzhir Memorial: A Journey Through History","day_summary":"


Start your day with a seamless pickup by our Travelxploria representative, embarking on a visit to the Alzhir Memorial Complex, 40 km from Astana. This solemn site, once a notorious Soviet labor camp, held over 20,000 women during Stalin’s repressions. Explore the museum and memorial, paying tribute to those who suffered. Return to Astana and continue your journey through the city's modern wonders. Visit the Palace of Peace and Reconciliation, a striking pyramid, and the Nur-Alem complex, a futuristic highlight from EXPO 2017. Enjoy free time before returning to your hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell to Kazakhstan","day_summary":"

Enjoy a relaxed morning with free time for last-minute shopping or a leisurely walk through Astana’s vibrant streets. After seamless check-out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth transfer to Astana International Airport. Bid farewell to the wonders of Kazakhstan, carrying unforgettable memories of its stunning landscapes, rich history, and warm hospitality. End of the Highlights of Kazakhstan Tour. Safe travels!

[{"city":"Singapore","country":"Singapore","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961665654-666.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961666004-6176.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961666305-7114.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961666437-flamingos-3206415_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961666463-pexels-mikhail-nilov-8319479.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961666630-pexels-palumalerba-2426546.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Singapore/Singapore/1744961667022-pexels-pixabay-326787.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive in Singapore - Guided City Tour - Visit Gardens By the Bay : Cloud Forest + Light & Sound Show (Weather Permitting)","day_summary":"

Upon arrival in Singapore, our Travelxploria representative will greet you with a warm welcome and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel. After a brief refresh, embark on a guided city tour led by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, exploring iconic landmarks like the Merlion, Marina Bay Sands, and the cultural gems of Chinatown. As the evening sets in, visit the breathtaking Gardens by the Bay, where the misty Cloud Forest awaits, showcasing a stunning indoor waterfall and lush greenery. As night falls, prepare for a magical experience with the Supertree Grove Light & Sound Show (weather permitting), where dazzling lights dance in harmony with music. MBS Sky Park (Non-Peak Timings) - Visit Sentosa Island by one way cable car","day_summary":"

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

packages.overview:
• Singapore Duck Tours & ArtScience Museum – Embark on a fun-filled, interactive journey through Singapore’s iconic sights and explore the innovative, hands-on exhibitions at the ArtScience Museum.

  • Universal Studios Singapore – Enjoy an adrenaline-pumping, action-packed day with thrilling, movie-themed rides inspired by blockbusters like Transformers and Jurassic Park.

  • Sentosa Island & Skyline Luge – Unleash your adventurous spirit at Sentosa, from the exciting Hydrodash water park to the exhilarating, fast-paced Skyline Luge.

  • Singapore Zoo & Bird Paradise – Discover a wildlife paradise, where majestic creatures roam naturalistic habitats and thousands of vibrant, exotic birds soar in expansive aviaries.

  • River Wonders & Night Safari – Explore fascinating, river-themed ecosystems, meet charming pandas, and embark on a magical, nocturnal adventure at the world-famous Night Safari.

  • Scenic Singapore River Cruise – Drift along the picturesque, historical Singapore River, witnessing the city’s stunning, modern-meets-heritage skyline.

  • Gardens by the Bay & Merlion Park – Marvel at futuristic, lush landscapes, towering Supertrees, and Singapore’s iconic majestic Merlion with breathtaking Marina Bay Sands views.

  • National Museum & Singapore Art Museum – Immerse yourself in rich, captivating history and thought-provoking, inspiring art exhibits blending culture, technology, and creativity.

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with the thrilling Singapore Duck Tours, an exciting land-and-water experience that takes you past iconic landmarks like Little India, Orchard Road, and Chinatown. Enjoy a unique perspective of the city as you cruise along the waters, soaking in its vibrant sights. Later, visit the mesmerizing ArtScience Museum, a stunning lotus-shaped landmark that blends art, science, culture, and technology. With interactive and hands-on exhibits, this museum offers an engaging experience for all ages, making it a must-visit attraction. Immerse yourself in creativity and innovation as you explore the wonders of Singapore!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Adventure at Universal Studios Singapore","day_summary":"


Step into the world of movie magic at Universal Studios Singapore, a thrilling theme park packed with action and adventure! Experience heart-pounding rides inspired by blockbuster films like Transformers, where you battle Decepticons in an exhilarating 3D ride, or take on the Jurassic Park Rapids Adventure for a wild water escapade. Explore themed zones like Hollywood, Ancient Egypt, and Sci-Fi City, each offering immersive attractions and live entertainment. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a movie lover, Universal Studios guarantees a day of non-stop excitement, making it a must-visit highlight of your Singapore trip!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Thrilling Sentosa Adventure","day_summary":"


Spend an action-packed day at Sentosa Island, Singapore’s ultimate playground for all ages! Dive into fun at Hy﻿drodash, a giant floating water park with exciting obstacle courses and designated zones for kids. For adrenaline junkies, hop onto the Skyline Luge, a thrilling three-wheeled cart ride that lets you race down winding tracks, offering an exhilarating experience for both the young and the young at heart. Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or family fun, Sentosa’s endless attractions make for an unforgettable day filled with excitement and laughter!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Wildlife Adventure: Singapore Zoo, Bird Paradise, River Wonders & Night Safari","day_summary":"

Experience the best of Singapore’s wildlife attractions in a single day! Begin at the Singapore Zoo, where its open-concept design lets animals roam freely in naturalistic habitats, providing an immersive experience. Next, explore Bird Paradise, home to over 5,000 birds across 400 species, with engaging exhibits and conservation-focused bird shows. Continue your journey at River Wonders, a unique river-themed wildlife park featuring ecosystems from the Amazon, Nile, and Yangtze, where you can see giant pandas, manatees, and exotic freshwater species. As night falls, embark on the Night Safari, an exhilarating journey through the world’s first nocturnal zoo, where you can spot fascinating night creatures on a guided tram ride or walking trails. A truly unforgettable day for nature lovers!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Singapore City Tour","day_summary":"

Experience the best of Singapore with our full-day city tour, covering iconic landmarks and cultural gems. Begin with a visit to the stunning Marina Bay Sands and the Merlion Park for breathtaking skyline views. Explore the vibrant streets of Chinatown and Little India, immersing yourself in rich heritage and flavors. Discover the futuristic Gardens by the Bay and the mesmerizing Supertree Grove. Enjoy a scenic drive through Orchard Road and the colonial district before visiting Sentosa Island for thrilling attractions. With hotel pick-up and drop-off, expert guidance, and seamless transportation, Travelxploria ensures an unforgettable Singapore adventure filled with charm and excitement.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

Enjoy a delightful breakfast before checking out from your hotel, cherishing the final moments of your unforgettable Singapore adventure. Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support ensure a hassle-free journey to Changi Airport, allowing you to relax and reflect on the incredible experiences you've had—from breathtaking attractions to thrilling adventures. Whether it’s the iconic skyline, vibrant culture, or unique wildlife encounters, Singapore has left you with lifelong memories. As you board your flight back home, take with you the joy of exploration and the promise of returning for another remarkable journey. Until next time, Singapore!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Heritage Discovery Tour
packages.overview: Discover the best of Singapore and Malaysia with Travelxploria on an unforgettable journey blending modern marvels and rich heritage. Arrive in vibrant Singapore and enjoy a relaxing start, followed by a city tour exploring Chinatown, Little India, and panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer. Marvel at the futuristic beauty of Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands before flying to Kuala Lumpur and transferring to the historic town of Malacca. Wander through Malacca’s UNESCO-listed landmarks and enjoy a charming river cruise. Continue to Kuala Lumpur to witness the iconic Petronas Twin Towers and the spiritual beauty of Batu Caves. With a perfect mix of sightseeing, cultural immersion, and leisure, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable escape across two incredible countries.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you on an immersive journey through the heart of Indochina, where timeless traditions and resilient spirits come alive at every turn. In Vietnam, you’ll glide aboard a private junk through the emerald karsts of Ha Long Bay, kayak beneath towering limestone pillars, and savor the bold flavors of street-side pho and banh mi with a local chef by your side. In the Mekong Delta, our expert guides will navigate you through lush canals on a traditional sampan, introducing you to floating-market vendors and family-run orchards heavy with tropical fruit. Crossing into Cambodia, you’ll dawn-visit the sublime terraces of Angkor Wat as the sun gilds its ancient stones, wander through jungle-cloaked temples with an archaeologist-guide decoding centuries-old bas-reliefs, and taste fragrant amok curry at a riverside village homestay. Along the way, Travelxploria handles every detail—seamless border transfers, boutique and heritage-style accommodations, hands-on cultural workshops, and insider access to wartime landmarks and colonial gems—so you can simply lose yourself in the beauty, history, and warmth of Vietnam and Cambodia.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Ho Chi Minh Half Day Tour With Lunch","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide to explore the world’s greatest monument—Angkor Wat. Unlike most temples in Cambodia that face east, Angkor Wat is uniquely oriented to the west. As the largest temple in the world, its immense stone structure rivals the Cheops Pyramid in Egypt. Continue your adventure by exploring the Great Angkor City of the Khmer Empire, a symbol of its golden era. Begin at the South Gate of Angkor Thom, where you can admire the breathtaking view of the Tonle Om River encircling the entire city. Next, visit the Bayon Temple, the magnificent state Buddhist temple built in the late 12th or early 13th century by Great King Jayavarman VII. Standing at the heart of Angkor Thom City, Bayon is a stunningly ornate Khmer temple known for its serene stone faces. Inside the palace enclosure, explore Baphuon Temple, an 11th-century mountain temple dedicated to Shiva, built during the reign of Suryavarman I. Admire its intricate carvings that cover nearly every surface. Next, visit The Terrace of the Elephants, used by King Jayavarman VII as a grand platform to review his victorious returning army. Then, explore the Terrace of the Leper King, named after a 15th-century statue believed to represent Yama, the Hindu god of death. After an enriching morning, take a break to relax and recharge with a delicious meal at a Khmer local restaurant near Srah Srang (at your own expense), where you can savor authentic Cambodian cuisine. In the afternoon, uncover one of Angkor’s most mystical and hidden gems—the Ta Prohm Temple. Known as Rajavihara in ancient times, this late 12th-century Bayon-style temple is famous for its massive tree roots intertwined with the ruins, creating a breathtakingly photogenic and atmospheric setting. It remains one of the most beloved temples in Angkor, offering a truly magical experience. As the day winds down, make your way to the top of Bakheng Mountain for a stunning panoramic sunset view from the Hindu mountain temple. Witness the golden hues of the setting sun casting a mystical glow over the Angkor landscape, creating an unforgettable moment. Finally, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your selected hotel, where you can relax and enjoy your own leisure time.

packages.package_name: Wonders of Vietnam: From Saigon to Sapa
packages.overview:
Explore Vietnam with Travelxploria – A Journey Through Culture, Nature & Timeless Charm

Vietnam is a land where every landscape tells a story and every street hums with life. With Travelxploria, discover a Southeast Asian gem known for its breathtaking natural wonders, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to the emerald rice terraces of Sapa and the tranquil shores of Da Nang, Vietnam’s beauty unfolds in every direction.

Step back in time as you explore ancient temples, French colonial avenues, and poignant war-era landmarks—each offering insight into a nation shaped by resilience and heritage. In the dynamic cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh, tradition meets modernity, where bustling street markets, motorbike-packed avenues, and rooftop cafes coexist in perfect harmony.

And of course, no journey is complete without tasting Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine—bursting with fresh herbs, bold flavors, and stories in every dish. From warm smiles to cultural riches, Vietnam welcomes you with open arms.

Let’s fly to your dream destination—with Travelxploria, your Vietnam adventure awaits.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with our driver, will pick you up at your hotel to begin the Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Upon arrival, you will watch a documentary film revealing the mystery behind the Cu Chi Tunnels, showcasing how they were constructed and how locals survived in harsh wartime conditions. Explore the intricate tunnel system, designed to withstand powerful bomb attacks, and discover Hoang Cam's smoke-less stove, secret hideouts, fighting bunkers, and dangerous booby traps. You will also visit a rice paper workshop and taste special tea and cassava, the staple food of guerrilla fighters during the war. Take a break and, if you wish, try shooting Vietnam War-era weapons like the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 light machine gun. After finishing the tour, the bus will take you back to your hotel. Later, our private driver will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Upon arrival, our representative will be there to pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before starting your adventure with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. At 08:30, our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you’ll take a breathtaking cable car ride to the summit, admiring panoramic views along the way. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden featuring a variety of vibrant blooms. Next, take another cable car ride to the enchanting French Village, situated at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its unique European-style architecture. In the afternoon, enjoy thrilling games at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most attractions, including a 4D movie experience, are included in the tour package. However, certain games with rewards may require an additional fee. After an exciting day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative and driver will warmly welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Early risers are in for a treat as they witness the breathtaking sunrise over the tranquil waters of Ha Long Bay. Enjoy the peaceful seascape and start your morning with an invigorating Tai Chi session on the sundeck, guided by experienced instructors. After a light breakfast, continue your cruise journey, taking in the mesmerizing limestone formations and capturing stunning photographs. Relax on board as the cruise sails through the scenic bay until noon. At 11:00 AM, disembark and meet Travelxploria’s representative and guide, who will assist with your comfortable transfer back to Hanoi. Depending on the cruise itinerary, lunch will be served either on board or at a selected restaurant in Halong City. Upon arrival in Hanoi, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

8:30 AM: After a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and driver will take you to the Cable Car Station, where you will enjoy a breathtaking 20-minute cable car ride with spectacular mountain scenery. 9:30 AM: Arriving at an altitude of 2,800 meters, take in the panoramic views, visit the spiritual pagoda, and trek up 600 steps to reach the peak of Fansipan – the Roof of Indochina. Spend approximately 1.5 hours hiking and capturing stunning photographs. 12:00 PM: Return to the Cable Car Station and head back to Sapa town, where the rest of the day is yours to explore at leisure. For an unforgettable cultural experience, we highly recommend visiting the Love Market on Saturday night, a unique gathering of ethnic minorities such as the H’mong and Dao people, showcasing the rich traditions of Lao Cai and Northwest Vietnam. Stay overnight at Sapa Relax Hotel, ensuring a comfortable and restful night.

packages.overview:
• Burj Khalifa – The world’s tallest building, offering breathtaking city views from its observation decks.

  • Palm Jumeirah – A man-made island home to luxury resorts, including Atlantis, The Palm.

  • Burj Al Arab – The world-famous sail-shaped luxury hotel.

  • Dubai Frame – A unique structure providing panoramic views of old and new Dubai.

  • Dubai Mall – One of the largest malls in the world, featuring an indoor aquarium, ice rink, and luxury shopping.

  • Mall of the Emirates – Home to Ski Dubai, an indoor ski resort.

  • Global Village – A cultural and shopping festival featuring pavilions from different countries.

  • Desert Safari – A thrilling experience with dune bashing, camel rides, and Arabian-style entertainment.

  • Dubai Marina Dhow Cruise – A luxurious dinner cruise with stunning views of Dubai’s skyline.

  • Skydiving & Hot Air Ballooning – For adrenaline seekers, experiences over Palm Jumeirah or the desert.

  • Al Fahidi Historical District – Explore Dubai’s heritage with its museums and traditional wind-tower houses.

  • Dubai Museum – Located in Al Fahidi Fort, showcasing the city’s transformation.

  • Jumeirah Mosque – A beautiful Islamic architectural landmark open to non-Muslim visitors.

packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Dubai","country":"United Arab Emirates","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928568199-1740768577013-pexels-abbas-mohammed-1990079-3680912.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928498628-1740768485316-AdobeStock_285462763-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928496279-1740768483363-AdobeStock_107329050-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497898-1740768484810-AdobeStock_274923414-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497623-1740768484615-AdobeStock_245665968-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Dubai with Burj Khalifa Visit with Fountain Show","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

As the sun sets over Dubai, get ready for a mesmerizing experience at the world-famous Fountain Show. Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up and ensure a seamless journey to this breathtaking spectacle. Watch in awe as water dances to rhythmic melodies, illuminated by dazzling lights, creating a magical display against the stunning city skyline. Feel the enchanting atmosphere as music, lights, and water come together in perfect harmony. After an unforgettable evening, our representative will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with memories of Dubai’s most iconic performance.

With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a whimsical paradise at Dubai Butterfly Garden, where thousands of delicate, colorful butterflies flutter around in a lush, tropical setting. A Travelxploria representative and guidewill pick you up from your hotel, ensuring asmooth and hassle-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the beautifully designed domes, where butterflies dance through the air, resting gently on flowers—and maybe even on you! Stroll through vibrant gardens, learn about their fascinating life cycle, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. Whether you're a nature lover or just looking for a magical experience, this place is pure enchantment. After soaking in the beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Discover the luxury and excitement of Atlantis, The Palm, an iconic Dubai landmark offering world-class experiences. A Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel for a smooth and comfortable journey to this majestic resort on Palm Jumeirah. Step into a world of elegance and adventure, where you can explore fine dining restaurants, luxurious lounges, and private beaches. Admire the stunning Arabian Gulf views, stroll through the lavish interiors, or unwind in a sophisticated setting. Whether you’re indulging in gourmet cuisine, experiencing thrilling water activities, or simply soaking in the extravagant ambiance, Atlantis promises a truly unforgettable experience. After an incredible time at this world-famous destination, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

packages.package_name: Glimmering Dubai: Where the Future Meets the Past
packages.overview: Explore Dubai with Travelxploria: Step into a land of contrasts where sun-baked dunes meet steel-and-glass marvels, and every moment feels like a new discovery. Begin your day with a golden desert safari—dune bashing, camel rides, and Bedouin hospitality—before soaring to the top of the Burj Khalifa for panoramic city views. Wander the winding alleys of the spice and gold souks, then witness futuristic feats like the Palm Jumeirah and Dubai Frame. As evening falls, glide along the Dubai Creek on a traditional dhow cruise or toast the skyline from a rooftop lounge. With Travelxploria, you’ll indulge in world-class cuisine, seamless luxury, and insider experiences that make Dubai not just a destination, but the adventure of a lifetime.

As you land at Dubai International Airport, the gateway to luxury and adventure, a warm welcome awaits from our dedicated Travelxploria representative. Spend the rest of the day unwinding, exploring the vibrant streets, or indulging in a peaceful retreat at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will pick you up and guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

After a delicious breakfast, step into the future with an awe-inspiring visit to the Museum of the Future, Dubai’s architectural and technological marvel! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience. With your admission ticket included, enter a world of cutting-edge innovation, space exploration, AI-driven exhibits, and futuristic concepts that redefine what’s possible. Walk through immersive displays that transport you to the year 2071, where technology, sustainability, and human potential come to life. Explore interactive exhibits on robotics, health, and smart cities, offering a glimpse into tomorrow’s world. Whether you’re fascinated by artificial intelligence or dreaming of space travel, this experience will ignite your imagination. After an enlightening journey through the future, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Prepare for a exciting journey into the AYA Universe, Dubai’s most futuristic and immersive experience! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your admission ticket included, step into a glowing world of light, sound, and interactive technology, where reality blurs into a digital dreamscape. Wander through 12 immersive zones, each transporting you to otherworldly realms filled with celestial beauty, floating rivers, and cosmic landscapes. Witness stunning AI-powered visuals, dance with digital projections, and feel like you’ve entered a parallel universe. This one-of-a-kind experience is perfect for those who love art, technology, and the unknown. Whether you’re exploring solo or with loved ones, every moment in AYA Universe is unforgettable. After this surreal adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Abu Dhabi","country":"United Arab Emirates","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Abu Dhabi/1740928646484-1740768712776-AdobeStock_339891770-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Abu Dhabi/1740928646824-1740768695986-abu-dhabi-1177898_1920_free.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Abu Dhabi/1740928645983-1740768712539-AdobeStock_167516873-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Abu Dhabi/1740928644924-1740768696075-abu-dhabi-4902818_1920_free.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"City Tour with Ferrari World Visit","day_summary":"

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

Emirates/Dubai/1740928497623-1740768484615-AdobeStock_245665968-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visit to the Atlantis Aquaventure & Lost Chambers","day_summary":"

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

Dive into a mesmerizing underwater world at The Lost Chambers Aquarium, where the myth of Atlantis comes to life, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey to this enchanting marine wonderland. With your entry ticket included, step into a world of mystical ruins and submerged tunnels, home to over 65,000 marine creatures. Watch majestic sharks, graceful stingrays, and colourful tropical fish swim past you in stunning glass tunnels. Explore interactive touch pools, learn about marine conservation, and witness fascinating feeding sessions as expert aquarists share insights into these incredible sea creatures. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or just seeking a peaceful escape, The Lost Chambers offers a truly magical experience. After immersing yourself in this aquatic paradise, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

Dive into a mesmerizing underwater world at The Lost Chambers Aquarium, where the myth of Atlantis comes to life, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey to this enchanting marine wonderland. With your entry ticket included, step into a world of mystical ruins and submerged tunnels, home to over 65,000 marine creatures. Watch majestic sharks, graceful stingrays, and colourful tropical fish swim past you in stunning glass tunnels. Explore interactive touch pools, learn about marine conservation, and witness fascinating feeding sessions as expert aquarists share insights into these incredible sea creatures. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or just seeking a peaceful escape, The Lost Chambers offers a truly magical experience. After immersing yourself in this aquatic paradise, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Afterwards, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Dubai City Tour – Explore iconic landmarks like the Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah, and Al Fahidi Historical District.

  • Desert Safari Adventure – Experience thrilling dune bashing, camel rides, and a BBQ dinner with entertainment under the stars.

  • Luxury & Leisure – Enjoy a Marina Dhow Cruise with dinner, indulge in shopping, or relax on Dubai’s stunning beaches.

  • Abu Dhabi Excursion – Visit the magnificent Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Emirates Palace, and explore Ferrari World for adventure.

[{"city":"Dubai","country":"United Arab Emirates","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928568199-1740768577013-pexels-abbas-mohammed-1990079-3680912.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928498628-1740768485316-AdobeStock_285462763-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928496279-1740768483363-AdobeStock_107329050-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497898-1740768484810-AdobeStock_274923414-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497623-1740768484615-AdobeStock_245665968-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Dubai with Limousine Tour & Dubai Frame","day_summary":"

As you land at Dubai International Airport, a world of luxury and adventure awaits. Our dedicated Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel. As you drive past the city's iconic skyline, marvel at the futuristic architecture and vibrant energy of Dubai. Upon arrival at your hotel, check-in and unwind in comfort, soaking in the excitement of the journey ahead.

Experience Dubai in ultimate style with a luxurious limousine tour, tailored to your preferred timing, be it a daytime city cruise or a glamorous night ride. Your Travelxploria representative and guide will ensure a smooth experience, with a pick-up from your hotel in a high end limousine, setting the tone for an extravagant journey. Sink into plush leather seats, enjoy ambient lighting, and sip on refreshing beverages as you glide past Dubai’s most iconic landmarks—Burj Khalifa, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and Jumeirah Beach Road. Whether celebrating a special occasion, enjoying a VIP experience, or just indulging in luxury, this ride offers unforgettable moments. Capture stunning photos at picturesque stops before arriving back at your hotel, where your chauffeur will drop you off in true celebrity fashion.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Whether you want a sunrise getaway, a midday adventure, or a breathtaking sunset cruise, set sail on a luxurious yacht at the preference of the guest. After picking you up from your hotel, your Travelxploria representative will make the easy transition to the marina, where your private or shared yacht is waiting for you. Pass famous sites like the Burj Al Arab, Atlantis the Palm, and the stunning Dubai Marina skyline as you glide across the Arabian Gulf's glittering waters. Savour cool beverages, unwind on the sun deck, and take in the expansive views of the coast. This yacht experience offers luxury activities, whether you're looking for a romantic retreat, a fun family outing, or a wild celebration you can enjoy all. We'll make sure you have a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

World","day_summary":"

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a world of fantasy, adventure, and nostalgia at Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi, the world’s largest indoor theme park, where your favorite characters come to life! Your Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel for a comfortable drive to Yas Island, where an action-packed day awaits. With your entry ticket included, explore six immersive lands, from the bustling streets of Gotham City and Metropolis to the whimsical world of Cartoon Junction and Bedrock. Meet Batman, Superman, Bugs Bunny, and Scooby-Doo, enjoy thrilling rides, and step into live entertainment shows filled with movie magic. Feel the adrenaline on high-speed roller coasters, explore interactive attractions, and relive childhood memories with beloved Warner Bros. characters. Whether you're a superhero fan or a cartoon lover, there’s something for everyone! After a fun-filled adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . The highlights of our trip was forest safari at Kaziranga National Park were we saw one horned rhinoceros .Travel Exploria did an amazing job with the hotel bookings ,coordinations and tour planning. We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

{"title":"Indranil Dey","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-01-22","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

This is the 2nd time my parents had a trip with Travelxploria, 1st time was Kashmir, this time was Kerela + Kanyakumari. They had an excellent experience. Both my parents are senior citizens, and they were taken utmost care at all the hotels wherever they had the night stay. I would always recommend Travelexporia for all my future trips of my parents and will also plan for myself as well.

Special thanks to Sudipto Metay who coordinated the tour.

{"title":"Swagata Chatterjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-11","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

{"title":"Aritra Basu","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-04-18","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We went for a girls trip to Thailand on 18th April with TravelXploria first time.From day one I talked to Mr. Sanjib for our trip and he did the best customised trip for us as per our requirement & choices. The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! Got all the info through my WhatsApp regarding cab timing, airport pickup n all. Only two things I didn't like . Hotel Ao nang timber house in krabi . Service is poor , no security guard n no receptionist after 8.00 pm &no basic toiletries .Another thing is the driver in bangkok was soo rude n rigid specially non cooperative. Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

overview:
Wander More, Spend Less: Travel Tales Under 75,000 with Travelxploria

Sometimes, magic hides in the most unexpected price tags. With Travelxploria’s handpicked journeys under 75,000, you’re not just checking off places—you’re unlocking portals to new cultures, warm smiles, and adventures that don’t ask your wallet for permission.

Step into worlds where glass towers kiss the clouds and street vendors serve recipes passed down through generations. Let yourself get lost in alleyways painted with murals, marketplaces humming with color, or monasteries perched on mountains that touch the sky. Glide over emerald waters on a slow boat, sip coffee under cherry blossoms, or dance under the open desert sky—it’s all possible, and beautifully affordable.

Our Best Tour Operator services ensure that even at this budget, you’ll find boutique stays, immersive experiences, and those little touches that make travel feel effortless. Whether it’s lantern-lit dinners by the lake, ancient cities whispered in legend, or jungle trails echoing with birdsong, every itinerary is crafted to move your heart, not just your feet.

With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator—we turn “someday” into “right now.” Perfect for couples seeking meaningful escapes, families building shared memories, or curious souls chasing the horizon, these thoughtfully designed Best Family Packages, romantic getaways, and cultural deep-dives are all within reach.

You don’t need to go far to go deep. You just need the right partner. Let Travelxploria take you there—unforgettable journeys under 75,000, wrapped in stories, not spreadsheets.
